calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mo To Compel Ans To Post-Judgt Disco
Off Calendar Jan-27-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $336.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Ntc Of Mo To Compel Ans To Post-Judgt Disco
Off Calendar Dec-01-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE - TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Plaintiff Creditors TradeAssociation, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery and For Monetary Sanctions is ordered off calendar. The motion was not filed 16 court days prior to this date, plus 5 days for mailing. The motion was filed November 3, 2005. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
